You must own equities to gain financial independence.
Investing is a game that you must play for 50 or more years. You need to finish first to be successful. You need to survive for 50 or more years.
The best way to thrive that long is to invest in a low-cost index fund.
You can download the presentation slides from [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.files.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F07%2Fthe-core-indexing.pdf&sr=1&signature=1388dc047cf9d41bac0e503e0302557e&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z).
You can watch the part 1, part 2, and part 3 of Finance and Investing series from [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2F02%2Fteaching-my-son-finance-and-investing-part-1-joys-of-compounding%2F&sr=1&signature=fe477fa388b4a4e18c611fdd043619e2&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z), [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2F06%2Fteaching-my-son-finance-and-investing-part-2-whats-getting-in-your-way%2F&sr=1&signature=fe159ba77dc613e9afbd37fbcd2a65b5&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z), and [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2F20%2Fteaching-my-son-finance-and-investing-part-3-how-to-think-about-investing%2F&sr=1&signature=8b38af405b05c9147afe386ece1f72e5&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z).
